meta.title: Galaxie Voyages — Urban and intercity transport in Cameroon
meta.description: An urban and intercity transport company in Cameroon. Travel safely and in comfort with Galaxie Voyages: Yaoundé, Mbalmayo, Ebolowa and Sangmélima.

hero.title: Travel across Cameroon, with confidence.
hero.subtitle: Daily connections between the cities of Cameroon's Centre and South regions aboard modern, safe and comfortable coaches.

features.title: Why travel with Galaxie Voyages
features.subtitle: Comfort and safety on every kilometre.

items.title: Safety first
items.text: Experienced drivers, well-maintained vehicles and real-time trip monitoring.

items.title: Modern comfort
items.text: Reclining seats, air conditioning and room for your luggage on all VIP routes.

items.title: On time
items.text: Regular, reliable departures several times a day on our main routes.

items.title: Regional network
items.text: The cities of the Centre and South linked by a single network, departing from Yaoundé.

experience.title: The Galaxie experience
experience.subtitle: Designed so every journey is as pleasant as the destination.

items.title: Comfort on board
items.text: Reclining seats, air conditioning and generous space for a relaxed journey.

items.title: Dedicated teams
items.text: Trained drivers and agency staff, at your service at every step.

items.title: Luggage secured
items.text: Spacious holds and careful handling of your luggage, from departure to arrival.

items.title: Punctuality
items.text: Regular departures, several times a day, on schedule.

services.title: Our services
services.subtitle: Much more than transport — a complete travel experience.

items.title: VIP transport
items.text: Our premium coaches: more space, air conditioning and on-board service for travel in the greatest comfort.

items.title: Standard transport
items.text: Reliable, affordable connections, ideal for your everyday intercity travel.

items.title: Organised trips
items.text: Discover new destinations with professional guidance, without worrying about the logistics.

items.title: Rental & charter
items.text: Buses and vehicles available to hire for your groups, events and private journeys.

about.title: About Galaxie Voyages
about.lead: Located in the Mvan district of Yaoundé, Galaxie Voyages is a travel company recognised for the quality of its services.
story: The company stands out through its commitment to safety, comfort and punctuality — essential values for guaranteeing client satisfaction. Every aspect of the service is designed to deliver a pleasant travel experience.

Galaxie Voyages operates a varied fleet of buses and cars, all carefully selected and regularly maintained to ensure an optimal level of safety. Whether you choose a VIP or standard service, every detail is taken into account for your comfort.

Beyond transport, the company also offers organised trips that let clients discover a range of destinations with professional guidance — an excellent way to travel without worrying about the logistics.

Whether for a short hop or a longer journey, travellers can expect attentive, quality service. A focus on the customer experience and an eye for detail make Galaxie Voyages a preferred choice for travelling with peace of mind.
about.mission: To give every Cameroonian intercity transport they can trust — safe, accessible and on time.

values.title: Trust
values.text: We earn our travellers' trust through consistent, transparent service.

values.title: Integrity
values.text: We act with honesty and keep our commitments, on every trip.

values.title: Respect
values.text: Every traveller and team member is welcomed with courtesy and consideration.

values.title: Creativity
values.text: We constantly look for better ways to serve our customers.

values.title: Innovation
values.text: We modernise our fleet and services so you always travel better.

values.title: Punctuality
values.text: We keep to our schedules — your time matters.

about.parentNote: Galaxie Voyages is a company of the GHF SARL group.
